 nickels = int(input('Enter the number of nickels Nathan has: ')) 
 
 if nickels % 4 == 0 or nickels % 5 == 0 or nickels % 7 == 0: 
 	num_stacks_4 = num_stacks(nickels - 2, 4) 
 	num_stacks_5 = num_stacks(nickels - 2, 5) 
 	num_stacks_7 = num_stacks(nickels - 2, 7) 
 
 if num_stacks_4 == num_stacks_5 and num_stacks_4 == num_stacks_7: 
 	print(nickels) 
 else: 
 	print('Error: The number of stacks is not the same for all stack sizes.')"}}
